response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep systems intuition, and notable open-source contributions in event-driven architectures and AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of leading large-scale fintech AI systems, managing 30+ engineer teams, or operating in regulated financial environments — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Proven experience building event-driven, scalable systems with real-time data (e.g., DLang microservices, GISCollective)
Hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, aligning with agentic AI needs
Strong engineering culture advocacy through workshops, TDD, CI/CD, and open-source tooling contributions
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or compliance-critical AI systems
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record of model-agnostic AI architecture or production-grade observability for multi-agent financial systems
